title: Remove heuristic deep-ocean pack cell dropping from packed topology
description: Explore finding from fmg-lib-n3m: local pack topology still uses heuristic water inclusion and drops every fourth deep-ocean cell, which likely creates wrong channel connectivity, haven choice, and harbor counts independent of higher-level feature grouping fixes.

title: Use shared upstream-style RNG stream for religion generation
description: Explore finding from fmg-lib-l07: local religion generation still uses a separate Alea stream seeded like `seed:religions`, while upstream uses the shared generation random stream. That keeps same-seed religion type, mode, and seed placement from converging even when counts match.

title: Reduce persistent burg overcount against upstream oracle
description: Explore finding from fmg-lib-n3m: persistent burg overcount remains a real bug and separate noise source, not just expected fallout from topology fixes. Track and reduce the local-vs-upstream burg count delta directly.

title: Replace d3-clipped Voronoi builder with upstream-style Voronoi geometry
description: Explore issue fmg-lib-57x found that local Voronoi geometry still comes from d3-clipped polygons instead of upstream raw Delaunator triangles with floored circumcenters. This changes vertex geometry, cell areas, border semantics, and likely keeps exact same-seed terrain parity out of reach. Port the upstream-style Voronoi builder and keep current callers intact.

title: Port upstream cells.s rankCells suitability model
description: Explore issue fmg-lib-l07 found that local burg/state seeding still uses a custom computeSuitability model instead of upstream rankCells / cells.s semantics. This likely keeps same-seed burg, capital, and state placement from converging even when terrain improves.

title: Expand states provinces and religions on full packed graph
description: Explore issue fmg-lib-l07 found that local states/provinces/religions still expand only across primary land pack cells, while upstream expands across the full packed graph. This likely causes persistent same-seed downstream parity drift independent of terrain.

title: Port upstream packed-topology and reGraph cell retention faithfully
description: Packed water-vs-land feature grouping is improved, but visible coastline/channel structure is unchanged. Remaining divergence likely sits in upstream-faithful pack cell selection, Voronoi retention, and coastline geometry rather than feature counting alone.

title: Port route-aware and water-aware religion spread behavior
description: Religion seed recentering is fixed, but region overlap is still flat. Remaining parity gap likely sits in upstream passage/spread behavior such as Routes.getRoute, water crossing, and route-weighted expansion.

title: Remove comparator-driven randomness from burg placement
description: Local burg placement currently calls random functions inside sort comparators, unlike upstream where randomized scores are computed once before deterministic sorting. This can desynchronize PRNG consumption and placement outcomes.
close_reason: Merged deterministic burg placement score sorting into main and reran parity/screenshots

title: Port upstream burg specify timing and stage order
description: Local burg generation/specification timing still differs from upstream. Upstream runs Burgs.generate earlier and Burgs.specify after routes and religions, while local folds some behavior into earlier placement. This changes seeded downstream behavior.
close_reason: Merged burg timing/order parity port into main and reran parity/screenshots

title: Port upstream seeded coordinate sampling in heightmap tools
description: Local heightmap tools still rely on local cell-range scanning and path helpers instead of upstream-style seeded coordinate sampling mapped through grid cells. This likely shifts hill/range/trough placement for the same seed.
close_reason: Merged upstream seeded coordinate sampling port into main and captured parity/screenshot results

title: Round jittered grid points like upstream
description: Upstream rounds jittered grid point coordinates with rn(..., 2) during grid generation. Local still stores raw jittered floats, which can change Voronoi topology and downstream seeded behavior for the same seed.
close_reason: Merged upstream-style jittered grid point rounding into main and reran parity/screenshots

title: Port upstream religion generation pipeline faithfully
description: Local religion generation still uses a simplified seed and spread flow. Upstream has different candidate selection, cult/heresy shares, mode selection, and spread behavior, causing region-count and overlap drift for the same seed.
close_reason: Merged religion generation parity improvements and reran parity/screenshots

title: Port upstream culture generation pipeline faithfully
description: Local culture generation still uses a simplified farthest-point seeding flow instead of upstream randomized culture center/type/expansion behavior. This changes downstream human geography for the same seed.
close_reason: Merged culture generation parity port into main and reran parity/screenshots

title: Align seed lifecycle and PRNG stream semantics with upstream
description: Upstream reseeds Math.random with Alea(seed) for grid generation and again for heightmap generation, then downstream stages continue from that Alea-backed stream. Local currently splits randomness across different generators, so the same seed does not drive the same downstream decisions. Port upstream seed/PRNG lifecycle semantics faithfully.
close_reason: Aligned local seed lifecycle more closely with upstream by separating grid Alea and downstream heightmap-seeded Alea stream; parity and screenshots rerun from the new baseline

title: Investigate parity regression after heightmap-local Alea port
description: A faithful-looking heightmap-local Alea reseeding and exact strait widening port regressed terrain, politics, and religion parity. Compare the regressing branch against the improved boundary-topology baseline and isolate which exact execution change caused the regression before merging any of it.
close_reason: Regression investigation yielded concrete child issues for seed lifecycle, heightmap coordinate sampling, jitter rounding, and downstream seeded human-geography mismatches

title: Port heightmap-local Alea RNG and exact strait widening
description: Heightmap execution still diverges because local uses the shared pipeline PRNG instead of upstream Alea reseeding, and strait widening still differs from upstream. Port those behaviors faithfully.
close_reason: Merged upstream-faithful heightmap-local Alea and strait port into main; remaining drift is tracked in follow-up regression issue fmg-lib-t7s

title: Audit remaining grid/Voronoi differences after boundary-point port
description: After porting upstream boundary points, terrain IOU improved but local land distribution is still left-heavy and too sparse. Compare current grid/Voronoi construction against upstream and identify remaining structural differences that still affect world silhouette.

title: Port upstream boundary-point Voronoi grid generation
description: Current grid generation omits upstream boundary points during Voronoi construction, which likely distorts coastlines and edge topology. Port the upstream boundary-point behavior faithfully and validate with oracle parity and screenshots.
close_reason: Merged upstream boundary-point topology fix into main and validated with parity and screenshots

title: Port upstream wind-tier precipitation behavior
description: Local precipitation still ignores upstream prevailing wind tiers and directional moisture transport. Port upstream wind-driven precipitation behavior faithfully after the map-position controls are in place.
close_reason: Ported upstream-style wind-driven precipitation behavior with default wind tiers; remaining major drift is terrain/world-shape rather than scenario controls

title: Port upstream climate and map-position controls into parity config
description: Upstream oracle exposes precInput, mapSize, latitude, and longitude controls that are not yet modeled in local generation or parity reconstruction. Add clean library-side equivalents so oracle comparisons use the same scenario inputs.
close_reason: Ported precipitation and map-position controls into config, parity harness, and screenshot path; remaining directional wind precipitation was split into follow-up issue fmg-lib-8hf

title: Port upstream feature grouping and reGraph coastline logic
description: Landmass count and coastline topology remain far from upstream. Port upstream feature grouping, ocean/lake separation, near-sea openings, and reGraph/repack logic faithfully until coastlines and channels align much better.

title: Port remaining upstream oracle scenario controls
description: Parity harness still does not fully reconstruct the upstream generation scenario. Audit and port remaining upstream controls that affect world shape and downstream systems so local and oracle runs are actually comparable.
close_reason: Audited and ported remaining oracle scenario controls except wind-driven precipitation, which was split into follow-up issue fmg-lib-8hf

title: Fix burg placement and north-clustered politics parity
description: Political layout is still visually wrong and settlement placement looks bunched in the north. Port upstream burg/state placement and expansion behavior faithfully after terrain topology is closer.
close_reason: Merged burg placement and politics parity port into main and reran parity/screenshots

title: Port upstream heightmap template execution faithfully
description: Current terrain IOU remains low and world silhouette is still far from upstream. Port upstream heightmap generator behavior step by step, preserving library/UI separation and matching template execution as faithfully as possible.

title: Finish oracle mismatch cleanup and faithful terrain port
description: Repair remaining upstream/local oracle scenario mismatches, then continue faithful terrain execution ports step by step until world-shape parity materially improves.
close_reason: Superseded by concrete child issues for oracle controls, terrain, topology, politics, religion, and parity tracking

title: Match upstream Voronoi cell area semantics
description: Explore finding from fmg-lib-57x: local cellsArea is still derived from d3-clipped polygons instead of upstream floored circumcenter polygons, causing persistent area drift that can perturb pack/coastal weighting and seeded downstream behavior.

title: Match upstream border-cell semantics from Voronoi halfedge gaps
description: Explore finding from fmg-lib-57x: local border detection still keys off polygon vertices touching map bounds instead of upstream halfedge-gap semantics, producing false-positive border cells that can affect lakes, pack behavior, and edge topology.

title: Use upstream-style Voronoi geometry in pack-space as well as grid-space
description: Explore finding from fmg-lib-57x: the non-upstream Voronoi builder is reused for packed graph generation, duplicating geometry, area, and border drift in pack-space even after grid-side fixes.

title: Derive state type from culture rather than capital burg type
description: Explore issue fmg-lib-n3m found that local state typing still depends on the capital burg cell, amplifying topology-sensitive noise into whole-state drift. Upstream derives state type from culture, so port that behavior to reduce seed-sensitive downstream divergence.

title: Classify expected vs bug-like downstream metric movement after topology fixes
description: Explore issues fmg-lib-l07 and fmg-lib-n3m identified that some downstream parity movement is expected fallout from more faithful topology, while other movement still signals real bugs. Capture those classifications in a concrete task so parity interpretation stays grounded during future terrain ports.

title: Port waterbody-level port assignment like upstream
description: Explore issue fmg-lib-n3m found that local ports are still assigned per burg immediately, unlike upstream's waterbody-level port pass. This likely overstates coastal/naval effects and perturbs seeded downstream politics after topology fixes.

title: Fix province coverage failure in politics integration test path
description: There is a pre-existing failure in the world-generation integration suite around province coverage inside the politics path. Investigate whether it is a real generation bug or an outdated invariant after recent parity ports.
close_reason: Merged province coverage test fix; issue was a stale test assumption

title: Fix zero-river structural consistency failure
description: There is a pre-existing structural consistency failure around zero rivers in the world-generation integration suite. Investigate whether it is a real hydrology regression or an outdated test assumption after recent terrain parity changes.
close_reason: Merged zero-river test fix; issue was a stale test assumption

title: Fix UI oracle screenshot under-fit framing
description: Local oracle-query screenshots under-fit the canvas, leaving large empty margins and making upstream/local visual review harder than it should be. Adjust camera fitting/presentation so oracle-sized worlds fill the frame more comparably to upstream.
close_reason: Merged UI framing fix for oracle screenshots and reran screenshot review

title: Investigate downstream state and religion drift after terrain sampling alignment
description: After aligning heightmap seeded coordinate sampling, terrain and burg alignment improved but downstream state and religion overlap still drift. Track the downstream fallout separately from terrain work.

title: Investigate downstream parity drift after topology-altering terrain fixes
description: Several upstream-faithful terrain/topology fixes materially changed downstream political and religion parity. Track and explain which downstream divergences are expected fallout from more faithful topology versus separate logic mismatches.

title: Align state-form timing with upstream stage order
description: Local assigns state forms before religions are fully available, while upstream defines state forms later. This changes both logic and random consumption for the same seed.
close_reason: Merged upstream-aligned state-form timing change into main and reran parity/screenshots

title: Port remaining upstream hidden generation controls
description: Upstream generation still depends on controls not fully modeled locally, including culture/religion/state tuning controls such as sizeVariety, neutralRate, growthRate, religionsNumber, culturesSet, and default option bundles. Audit and port them into clean library config where needed.
close_reason: Merged hidden upstream control ports into main and reran parity/screenshots

title: Track AGENTS.md upstream-path documentation update
description: User requested adding the upstream code path reference to AGENTS.md and using the correctly spelled AGENTS.md filename. Update instructions accordingly.
close_reason: Renamed merged instructions file to AGENTS.md and added upstream reference path guidance

title: Port upstream religion spread parity
description: Religion counts and region overlap still diverge from upstream. Port upstream religion seed selection and spread behavior after terrain and politics inputs are corrected.
